Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Denied

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John M. Collins, Esq. appeared for plaintiff LBA Realty Fund III-Company V, LLC a Delaware Limited Liability Company.
No appearance by defendant EMOTIV Systems, Inc. a Delaware corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on March 5, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 19, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 23, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff LBA Realty Fund III-Company V, LLC a Delaware Limited Liability Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant EMOTIV Systems, Inc., a Delaware corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal $123,677.70.
Interest - To Be Determined.
Attorney Fees - $5,400.00.
Costs - $495.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than April 30, 2010.
